article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.1.1. 14797 Burnaby BIA (Burnaby North Road) Bylaw 2026 (FA).pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby North Road BIA Renewal — Five-Year Funding and Local Tax Plan
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would renew the Burnaby North Road Business Improvement Area (BIA) for five years, starting April 1, 2026. The bylaw would authorize over $1.75 million in grants to the local business association, funded by a special property tax on businesses and light-industrial properties within the BIA boundary.
briefs.action_required: Check if your property falls within the Burnaby North Road BIA boundary — you may owe a new local tax.

key_dates.label: Burnaby North Road BIA bylaw — five-year term takes effect

Burnaby North Road BIA — annual budget submission deadline (Association to City)
Burnaby North Road BIA bylaw — five-year term ends
